---
title: "SCIMETAR LINE-1 qPCR"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
execute:
  warning: false
  error: false
  cache: true
---

## Load LINE1 PCR results from csv 

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggridges)
library(viridis)
library(ggh4x)

## load LINE1 and amplicon from GSB
seuratobj <- readRDS('output/seurat_zumi_rpkm_unfilt2.rds')

pcr <- seuratobj@meta.data %>%
  mutate(across(c(HEX_Ref, FAM_Tar), ~ na_if(.x, "N/A"))) 

pcr <- pcr %>%
  mutate(col = str_remove(Well_ID, '^[A-Z]') %>% as.numeric(),
         row = factor(as.character(str_remove(Well_ID, '[0-9][0-9]$')), levels = c("H","G","F","E","D","C","B","A")),
         empty = Is_Empty,
         HEX_Ref = as.numeric(HEX_Ref) %>% round(digits = 2),
         FAM_Tar = as.numeric(FAM_Tar) %>% round(digits = 2)) %>%
    mutate(dCt = FAM_Tar - HEX_Ref) %>%
    unite(group, Cell_Type,Treatment, remove = F) 
```


## Distribution by plate location
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}

pcr %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row, fill = HEX_Ref, col = empty)) + 
  geom_tile(linewidth=1) +
  facet_wrap(.~Plate, ncol = 7, nrow = 4) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c('TRUE'='red', 'FALSE'='black')) +
  scale_fill_viridis() +
  ggtitle('HEX_Ref faceted by well')

pcr %>% 
  group_by(col, row, empty) %>%
  summarise(HEX_Ref = mean(HEX_Ref, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row, fill = HEX_Ref, col = empty)) + 
  geom_tile(linewidth=1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c('TRUE'='red', 'FALSE'='black')) +
  scale_fill_viridis() +
  ggtitle('HEX_Ref all well average (NA remove)')

pcr %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row, fill = FAM_Tar, col = empty)) + 
  geom_tile(linewidth=1) +
  facet_wrap(.~Plate, ncol = 7, nrow = 4) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c('TRUE'='red', 'FALSE'='black')) +
  scale_fill_viridis() +
  ggtitle('FAM_Tar faceted by well')

pcr %>% 
  group_by(col, row, empty) %>%
  summarise(FAM_Tar = mean(FAM_Tar, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row, fill = FAM_Tar, col = empty)) + 
  geom_tile(linewidth=1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c('TRUE'='red', 'FALSE'='black')) +
  scale_fill_viridis() +
  ggtitle('FAM_Tar all well average (NA remove)')

```

## Adding cutoff based on HEX_ref
### Calculated the cutoff plate wise
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}

cutoff_plate <- pcr %>%
  group_by(Plate, group) %>%
  summarise(HEX_Ref_group_mean = mean(HEX_Ref, na.rm = T),
            HEX_Ref_group_median = median(HEX_Ref, na.rm = T),
            HEX_Ref_group_sd = sd(HEX_Ref, na.rm = T),
            HEX_Ref_group_mad = mad(HEX_Ref, na.rm = T),
            HEX_Ref_group_5 = quantile(HEX_Ref, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE),
            HEX_Ref_group_95 = quantile(HEX_Ref, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(HEX_Ref_group_lower = HEX_Ref_group_mean - 1*HEX_Ref_group_sd,
         HEX_Ref_group_upper = HEX_Ref_group_mean + 1*HEX_Ref_group_sd, 
         HEX_Ref_group_lower2 = HEX_Ref_group_median - 2*HEX_Ref_group_mad,
         HEX_Ref_group_upper2 = HEX_Ref_group_median + 2*HEX_Ref_group_mad) 

pcr2 <- pcr %>% 
  left_join(cutoff_plate, by = c('group','Plate')) %>%
  mutate(keep_qt = HEX_Ref < HEX_Ref_group_95 & HEX_Ref > HEX_Ref_group_5,
         keep_mean = HEX_Ref > HEX_Ref_group_lower & HEX_Ref < HEX_Ref_group_upper,
         keep_median = HEX_Ref > HEX_Ref_group_lower2 & HEX_Ref < HEX_Ref_group_upper2) 

cat("Percentage of keeped wells using plate-wise 1% and 90% quantiles.\n")
pcr2 %>%
  count(group, keep_qt) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(pct = n/sum(n), 
            keep = keep_qt)

cat("Percentage of keeped wells using plate-wise mean and 1 sd.\n")
pcr2 %>%
  count(group, keep_mean) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(pct = n/sum(n), 
            keep = keep_mean)

cat("Percentage of keeped wells using plate-wise median and 2 mad.\n")
pcr2 %>%
  count(group, keep_median) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(pct = n/sum(n),
            keep = keep_median)

pcr2 %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(HEX_Ref, FAM_Tar),
               names_to  = "Channel",
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= factor(Plate), y = Value, 
             fill = Is_MspI)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  # add dashed 1th‐percentile lines
  geom_hline(
    aes(yintercept = HEX_Ref_group_5),
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "black"
  ) +
  # add dashed 90th‐percentile lines
  geom_hline(
    aes(yintercept = HEX_Ref_group_95),
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "black"
  ) +
  # add dashed upper lines
  geom_hline(
    aes(yintercept = HEX_Ref_group_upper),
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "red"
  ) +
  # add dashed lower lines
  geom_hline(
    aes(yintercept = HEX_Ref_group_lower),
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "red"
  ) +
    # add dashed upper lines
  geom_hline(
    aes(yintercept = HEX_Ref_group_upper2),
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "blue"
  ) +
  # add dashed lower lines
  geom_hline(
    aes(yintercept = HEX_Ref_group_lower2),
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "blue"
  ) +
  facet_grid(Channel~Plate, space = 'free_x', scales = "free_x") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(y = "PCR cycles",
       x = "Plate",
       title = "HEX vs FAM density by Plate")
```


### Position of rejected wells by plate and group
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}
pcr2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row, fill = keep_median, col = empty)) + 
  geom_tile(linewidth=1) +
  facet_wrap(.~Plate, ncol = 7, nrow = 4) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c('TRUE'='red', 'FALSE'='black')) +
  #scale_fill_viridis() +
  ggtitle('Outliers faceted by well cutoff based on plate median')

```

## dCt value
### dCt value in all wells
dCT = FAM_Tar - HEX_Ref
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}
cat("Summary of delta Ct (dCt) values in all wells.\n")
summary(pcr2$dCt)

pcr2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= dCt, y = group, fill = factor(stat(quantile)), #fill = Channel,
           group = group)) +
  stat_density_ridges(
    geom = "density_ridges_gradient",
    calc_ecdf = TRUE,
    quantiles = c(0.025, 0.975)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Probability", values = c("#FF0000A0", "#A0A0A0A0", "#0000FFA0"),
    labels = c("(0, 0.025]", "(0.025, 0.975]", "(0.975, 1]")
  ) + 
  # geom_density_ridges(position = position_identity(), 
  #                     scale = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  # facet_wrap(Cell_Type ~ Treatment, scales = "free_y") + 
  theme_ridges(center_axis_labels = TRUE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(x = "dCT value",
       y = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate combined)")

pcr2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x= group, y = dCt, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate combined)")

pcr2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x= group, y = dCt, fill = Is_MspI)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  facet_wrap(~ Is_MspI) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate combined)", 
       subtitle = "Stratified by is_Msp1")

pcr2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= dCt, y = group, fill = factor(stat(quantile)), #fill = Channel,
           group = Plate)) +
  stat_density_ridges(
    geom = "density_ridges_gradient",
    calc_ecdf = TRUE,
    quantiles = c(0.025, 0.975)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Probability", values = c("#FF0000A0", "#A0A0A0A0", "#0000FFA0"),
    labels = c("(0, 0.025]", "(0.025, 0.975]", "(0.975, 1]")
  ) + 
  # geom_density_ridges(position = position_identity(), 
  #                     scale = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  # facet_wrap(Cell_Type ~ Treatment, scales = "free_y") + 
  theme_ridges(center_axis_labels = TRUE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(x = "dCT value",
       y = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate separated)")

pcr2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x= factor(Plate), y = dCt, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate separated)")

pcr2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x= factor(Plate), y = dCt, fill = Is_MspI)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  facet_wrap(~ Is_MspI) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate separated)",
       subtitle = "Stratified by is_Msp1")

```

### dCt value in passed wells (plate based)
dCT = FAM_Tar - HEX_Ref
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}

cat("Summary of delta Ct (dCt) values in plate passed wells.\n")
summary(pcr2 %>% filter(keep_median) %>% pull(dCt))

pcr2 %>% 
  filter(keep_median) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= group, y = dCt, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate combined)")

pcr2 %>% 
  filter(keep_median) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= group, y = dCt, fill = Is_MspI)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  facet_wrap(~ Is_MspI) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate combined)", 
       subtitle = "Stratified by is_Msp1")

pcr2 %>% 
  filter(keep_median) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= factor(Plate), y = dCt, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate separated)")

pcr2 %>% 
  filter(keep_median) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= factor(Plate), y = dCt, fill = Is_MspI)) +
  geom_violin(trim = F) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) + 
  facet_wrap(~ Is_MspI) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom"
        ) +
  labs(y = "dCT value",
       x = "group",
       title = "dCT value by group (plate separated)",
       subtitle = "Stratified by is_Msp1")
```

### dCt values by plate position
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, dev=c('png', 'pdf')}
pcr2 %>% 
  mutate(dCt_cut = cut(dCt, breaks = c(-Inf, 0, 20, Inf))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = col, y = row, fill = dCt_cut, col = keep_median)) + 
  geom_tile(linewidth=1) +
  facet_wrap(.~Plate, ncol = 7, nrow = 4) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c('FALSE'='red', 'TRUE'='black')) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(direction = -1) +
  ggtitle('Outliers faceted by well plate based')

```

```{r}
write.csv(pcr2 %>%
  select(-(HEX_Ref_group_mean:HEX_Ref_group_upper2)), 
  "output/LINE1_qPCR_all.csv", row.names = F)
```
